instruction: Write a FreeMarker template that lists `authors` as a definition list: each author map has `name` and `role` string fields. Escape both fields. Show a fallback message when no authors exist.
code:
<#-- Model: authors: sequence of maps { name, role } --> <#if !authors?has_content>

No authors listed.

<#else>
<#list authors as author>
${author.name?html}
${author.role?html}
